scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-schema.js && node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @arsnova/backend" "npm run start:de -w @arsnova/frontend"
scripts.dev:de: node scripts/ensure-schema.js && node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @arsnova/backend" "npm run start:de -w @arsnova/frontend"
scripts.dev:en: node scripts/ensure-schema.js && node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @arsnova/backend" "npm run start:en -w @arsnova/frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: node scripts/ensure-schema.js && node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs --ports=3000,3001,3002 && npm run dev -w @arsnova/backend
scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w @arsnova/shared-types && npm run build -w @arsnova/session-export-report
scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build -w @arsnova/backend && npm run build -w @arsnova/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @arsnova/shared-types && npm run build -w @arsnova/session-export-report && npm run typecheck -w @arsnova/backend && npm run typecheck -w @arsnova/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @arsnova/shared-types && npm run test -w @arsnova/session-export-report && npm run test -w @arsnova/backend && npm run test -w @arsnova/frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:libs && npm run test:coverage -w @arsnova/shared-types && npm run test -w @arsnova/session-export-report && npm run test:coverage -w @arsnova/backend && npm run test:coverage -w @arsnova/frontend
scripts.seed:motd-making-of: npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260329140000_motd_making_of_ai/migration.sql && npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260331100000_motd_making_of_align_start/migration.sql && npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260331150000_motd_making_of_greeting_line/migration.sql && npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260331160000_motd_making_of_herstellungskosten/migration.sql && npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260331170000_motd_making_of_openhub_active/migration.sql
scripts.seed:motd-confidence-slider: npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260713160000_motd_confidence_slider/migration.sql && npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260713203000_motd_confidence_didactic_summary/migration.sql && npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260714040000_motd_confidence_copy_v7/migration.sql && npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260715071600_motd_confidence_copy_v8/migration.sql && npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260715075500_motd_confidence_copy_v9/migration.sql
scripts.seed:motd-session-results-pdf: npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260717153000_motd_session_results_pdf_report/migration.sql && npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260717164000_motd_session_results_pdf_example_link/migration.sql && npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260718083400_motd_session_results_pdf_nachbesprechungsplan/migration.sql && npx prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260719071500_motd_session_results_pdf_locale_links/migration.sql
scripts.setup:dev: npm run docker:up:dev && npm run prisma:push && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w @arsnova/shared-types
scripts.build:prod: npm run build -w @arsnova/shared-types && npm run build -w @arsnova/backend && npm run build:localize -w @arsnova/frontend
